footer.tagline: High-performance Windows RDP plans for focused, always-on workloads.

title: TrueRDP Plans

hero.headline: Choose a TrueRDP plan and start your order in minutes
hero.description: Select duration, pick a payment method, and generate a transaction. Provisioning is handled by admin confirmation in the current flow.
hero.trustLine: Low-latency infrastructure with transparent plan comparisons.

valueProps.title: Performance-first plans
valueProps.description: Concrete CPU, RAM, and storage specs make infrastructure choices predictable.

valueProps.title: Straightforward purchase flow
valueProps.description: Plan selection and checkout initiation are optimized for low friction.

valueProps.title: Location and type clarity
valueProps.description: Plan grouping by type and geography keeps decision-making quick and transparent.

valuePropsSection.headline: Built for buyers who want the right machine without a long sales loop

journeySection.headline: From selection to server access in three clear steps
journeySection.description: The buying path stays simple for customers: compare the plan, complete checkout, and let support finish provisioning.

steps.title: Choose
steps.description: Compare CPU, RAM, storage, duration, and region before selecting the right RDP plan.
details: Start with plan type, location, and resource requirements.
Review available durations and starting price before checkout.
Use the comparison table if you need to scan every spec side-by-side.

steps.title: Checkout
steps.description: Create the order through the guided checkout flow with the plan details already confirmed.
details: Confirm the selected duration and plan price.
Sign in or create an account so the order stays attached to you.
Move into the secure payment review flow without repeating plan details.

steps.title: Provision
steps.description: After payment confirmation, support prepares access and follows through on setup.
details: Payment confirmation creates the provisioning request for the team.
Support assigns the matching RDP resources from available inventory.
Access details and next steps are handled through the customer flow.

sections.featuredPlansDescription: Compare entry prices and launch the right environment in minutes.
sections.comparisonDescription: Use this matrix to compare plan resources and locations before checkout.

locationSection.headline: Pick the region that keeps your RDP workflow close to where it runs
locationSection.description: Browse active availability by geography, then compare the matching plan resources and durations.
locationSection.footerDescription: Location cards update from active backend inventory.

testimonialsSection.headline: Trusted by buyers who need clear specs and quick checkout

items.quote: The plan cards made it easy to compare capacity and get into checkout without a slow quote process.
items.name: Arjun M.

items.quote: We needed remote Windows capacity quickly. TrueRDP gave us clear durations, specs, and locations up front.
items.name: Meera S.

items.quote: The buying flow is simple, and the resource details are visible before payment. That saves a lot of back-and-forth.
items.name: Daniel K.

faqPreviewSection.headline: Know what happens before you choose a plan
faqPreviewSection.description: The common buying questions are answered up front, and the full FAQ is available when you need more detail.

items.question: How quickly can I place an order?
items.answer: Choose a plan duration, start checkout, and the order is created in the same flow. Provisioning follows the current admin confirmation process.

items.question: Can I compare plans by location?
items.answer: Yes. The homepage and plans catalog both group inventory by plan type and deployment location so you can evaluate latency and geography before checkout.

items.question: What details are shown before payment?
items.answer: Plan cards show CPU, RAM, storage, location, plan type, and available durations so you can choose without hidden assumptions.

liveSupportSection.headline: Need help choosing capacity? Chat with support before checkout.
liveSupportSection.description: Tawk.to live chat is ready for the marketing site. Use the chat widget for plan fit, order questions, and provisioning status.

seoDescription: Browse TrueRDP hosting plans, compare pricing, and start checkout instantly.

title: Frequently Asked Questions
summary: Common answers about plans, payments, and provisioning.

items.question: How quickly are instances provisioned?
items.answer: After payment confirmation, admin provisions and assigns a server. Provisioning time depends on queue and inventory.

items.question: Can I renew before expiry?
items.answer: Yes. Renewals extend your expiry date. Suspended instances must be unsuspended before renewal.

items.question: Which payment methods are available?
items.answer: Available methods include UPI, USDT TRC20, Dodo checkout, and CoinGate checkout based on configuration.

seoDescription: Answers to common questions about plans and billing.

title: Terms of Service
summary: Terms and conditions for using TrueRDP.

children.text: Use the service lawfully and in accordance with acceptable use requirements.
Orders are billed according to selected plan pricing and duration.

seoDescription: Terms and conditions for TrueRDP services.

title: Privacy Policy

children.text: We collect account, billing, and operational data needed to provide the service.
Data is used for account management, provisioning, support, and security.

seoDescription: How TrueRDP collects, uses, and protects data.

title: Refund Policy
summary: Refund terms for purchases and renewals.

children.text: Refund eligibility depends on service usage and timing from purchase.
Requests are reviewed case-by-case by support and admin.

seoDescription: Refund terms for TrueRDP plans and renewals.

title: Contact & Support
summary: Ways to reach support and open tickets.

children.text: Open a ticket from your dashboard support page for issue tracking.
Our team responds based on queue priority and operational impact.
